name: I'm at the corner of Main & Mountain View
description: I'm at the corner of Main & Mountain View
hints: Corner with a hardware store. The mountain is visible to the north beyond the parking lot.
GO HARDWARE or GO STORE to enter the hardware store for essential tools. EAST and WEST both go behind the mountain.
NORTH leads to the parking lot (room 18). SOUTH returns to Main & Hickory (room 3). EAST and WEST both go behind the mountain on Mountain View (room 28). The hardware store has critical items.
Visit the hardware store for the climber's pick, hydrometer, pump, and jumper cables. NORTH leads toward the parking lot and eventually the mountain.
notes: Corner of Main & Mountain View with the hardware store entrance. NORTH to parking lot east end (room 18). SOUTH to Main & Hickory (room 3). EAST and WEST both lead behind the mountain (room 28). Hardware store (room 17) is entered via GO STORE.
